meaning: n.[物]重心,[天]引力中心,质(量中)心
examples: On these grounds, designed the scheme of barycentre control system.

This paper develops a set of barycentre of plane automat Ed control system based on industrial personal computer and programmable logic controller aiming at the defect of avionics in our country.
